rationale: Elec. Code §4.007 governs notice to election judges about election logistics. It does not address homestead exemption amounts or tax policy, so no conflict arises from increasing the §11.13(b) exemption.
quote: Sec. 4.007. NOTICE TO ELECTION JUDGE. Not later than the 15th day before election day or the seventh day after the date the election is ordered, whichever is later, the authority responsible for giving notice of the election shall deliver to the presiding judge of each election precinct in which the election is to be held in the authority's jurisdiction a written notice of:
_note: No conflict. §4.007 concerns election notice procedures, not tax exemption levels.
